title: stillingia elliptica
intro: Stillingia elliptica, also known as Queen's Delight or American Toothache Root, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, derived from the root, which contains a compound called saponin. The medicinal properties of Stillingia elliptica have been found to provide relief from pain, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating toothaches, gum infections, and other oral health issues. Herbal preparations of Stillingia elliptica can be made into teas, tinctures, or ointments, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
